description: The PerformanceMetrics component is used to show performance for a particular ``User`` at the present moment.

fields.User: The user we are measuring performance for.
fields.RenderTime: ``User``'s time it takes to render the scene in seconds.
fields.TotalEngineUpdateTime: ``User``'s time it takes to update the engine in seconds.

usage: Attach to a slot and provide a user for ``User`` for it to start giving performance metrics.
